system.effect: The psyker gains a continuous stream of visions of the immediate future, granting Unnatural Ballistic Skill and Unnatural Weapon Skill equal to half his Psy Rating (rounded up) for the duration of the power.

description.value: The psyker opens his consciousness fully to the flow of time, perceiving attacks before they are made and knowing where enemies will be before they move. For the duration of the power, the psyker gains Unnatural Ballistic Skill and Unnatural Weapon Skill with values equal to half his Psy Rating (rounded up).
